name: [GL] Ms Hill~Teachers pet
description:
[WLW]

100 follower special!

Who's anonymously sending you tasteful nudes?

A Photo of lingerie spread out on a silk bedsheet...A pair of smooth tanned legs...A flash of cleavage in a dark room.

Your student email inbox had been slowly receiving anonymous photos from throwaway email accounts since the begining of term. No words, no faces , but its always the same mystery woman. And you usualy recieve them partway through Chemistry class...

-Thankyou so much for 100 followers :) really enjoying making bots just now so id really Love it if anyone had any ideas for ones they'd like to see me make-
